name: com.52choujiang/douyin-insights
title: SocialDataX 抖音 Douyin MCP
description: 抖音 / Douyin MCP for hot search, work search/details, comments/replies, creator profiles, creator works, creator series, and speech-to-text transcript.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer API key from SocialDataX / 社媒数据助手

tools.name: douyin_get_hot_search_list
tools.description: Get the current Douyin / 抖音 main hot search list.

tools.name: douyin_search_videos
tools.description: Search Douyin works by keyword with optional paging and filters.

tools.name: douyin_get_video_detail_by_aweme_id
tools.description: Fetch structured work details when the caller already has an aweme_id.

tools.name: douyin_get_video_detail_by_url
tools.description: Resolve a Douyin content page link, short link, or share text into structured work details.

tools.name: douyin_submit_video_speech_text_by_video_url
tools.description: Submit a Douyin work video speech-to-text transcript task from a work page link, short link, or share text. 提交完成后最多短等 15 秒；if not finished, returns a job handle.

tools.name: douyin_submit_video_speech_text_by_aweme_id
tools.description: Submit a Douyin work video speech-to-text transcript task from an aweme_id. 提交完成后最多短等 15 秒；if not finished, returns a job handle.

tools.name: douyin_get_video_speech_text_job
tools.description: Check a Douyin video speech-to-text transcript job by job_id without starting a new task. This v1 surface returns transcript only, not summary.

tools.name: douyin_get_video_comments_by_aweme_id
tools.description: Fetch paginated first-level comments when the caller already has an aweme_id.

tools.name: douyin_get_video_comments_by_url
tools.description: Fetch paginated first-level comments directly from a Douyin content page link, short link, or share text.

tools.name: douyin_get_video_comment_replies_by_comment_id
tools.description: Fetch paginated replies under a first-level comment; pass both aweme_id and comment_id, and use page_token to continue pagination.

tools.name: douyin_get_user_info_by_sec_user_id
tools.description: Fetch creator profile data when the caller already has a sec_user_id.

tools.name: douyin_get_user_info_by_profile_url
tools.description: Resolve a Douyin profile link, short link, or share text into creator profile data.

tools.name: douyin_get_user_posted_videos_by_sec_user_id
tools.description: Fetch a paginated list of works published by a creator when the caller already has a sec_user_id.

tools.name: douyin_get_user_posted_videos_by_profile_url
tools.description: Fetch a paginated list of works published by a creator from a profile link, short link, or share text.

tools.name: douyin_get_user_series_by_sec_user_id
tools.description: Fetch creator short-drama / series lists when the caller already has a sec_user_id.

tools.name: douyin_get_user_series_by_profile_url
tools.description: Fetch creator short-drama / series lists from a profile link, short link, or share text.
